name: anytone-v2
description: AnyTone D578 controller — v2 (redesign). Layered, capture-verified rebuild of the PoC in ../app. See redesign/*.md for the contract.
comment:overrides: dbus-next's runtime XML parser (xml2js) → patched; its OPTIONAL usocket build toolchain (node-gyp→request/tar/…) → modern node-gyp (no `request`) + safe tar. usocket is unused (BlueZ system bus uses a filesystem socket plain net handles) and its native build is skipped here, so these clear lockfile-phantom audit findings.
